channel.title: JLT Supplier Spotlight (Facebook)
channel.description: Weekly Supplier Spotlight from JLT Group — supplier training features for JLT agents

item.title: Fresh supplier spotlight for you all 🚢
item.description:
Fresh supplier spotlight for you all 🚢
Royal Caribbean's brand-new Legend of the Seas is now in service… the third Icon-class ship, and the first one ever to sail in Europe. If clients have been asking about "the big new one", this is her.
Why she's worth a spot in your book:
⚓ First Icon-class ship in Europe, with live inaugural buzz right now
👨‍👩‍👧‍👦 Built for multigen families: waterpark, kids' zones, adults-only Hideaway, 28 restaurants
🌊 5,610 guests but engineered so it never feels packed… your answer to the crowd worry
🇪🇸 Med sailings from Barcelona and Rome now, Caribbean from autumn, Europe again in 2027
Catch the full session and 300+ others in the agent hub webinar library. Full written spotlight is on the website too… link in the comments 🔗
